messages.subject: [R-gui] GUI
messages.body_plain:
On Mon, Apr 9, 2012 at 8:13 PM, Naveen Verma <naveensimla at gmail.com> wrote:
> requested sir,
> ? ? plz let me know, which package is more suitable to make GUI using R
> with more features....
>
If you want to use a GUI, look into Rcmdr and Deducer (and their
plugins) and perhaps RStudio. If you want to build a GUI on top of R,
see the plugins just mentioned and packages such as gWidgets, traitr,
tcltk2, etc.

Liviu

Best,
Thomas
